reviews.comment:
ACA Choele Choel, excelente atención. Cuenta con playón para pernocte de motorhome, gratuito, seguro e iluminado. Baños limpios, gas envasado, servicompras.

(Translated by Google)
ACA Choele Choel offers excellent service. It has a free, safe, and well-lit area for overnight parking for motorhomes. Clean restrooms, bottled gas, and a convenience store are also available.

reviews.comment:
10.30 am La estación estaba cerrada por capacitación , por lo cual ningún empleado estaba atendiendo .
El baño de damas estaba limpio pero los inodoros tapados.

(Translated by Google)
10:30 a.m. The station was closed for training, so no employees were on duty.
The women's restroom was clean, but the toilets were clogged.

reviewReply.comment: Sepa usted disculparnos, lamentamos su mala experiencia

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSelBiQkNREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención en general. El servicompras muy lindo, limpio y cálida atención. Afuera en la playa, los muchachos están atentos, ando en moto y hasta me han limpiado el parabrisas, la verdad esos detalles suman!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service overall. The convenience store is very nice, clean, and the staff is friendly. Outside on the beach, the guys are attentive; I was riding a motorcycle and they even cleaned my windshield—those little touches really make a difference!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSbFA3TVNBEAE
